summary: Admin HTTP 服务骨架与鉴权已完成：server.js 实现 AdminServer 生命周期（start/stop/getStatus），adminEnabled=false 时返回禁用状态不监听端口；router.js 实现轻量 method+path 路由匹配和 :id 参数提取；response.js 实现统一 JSON 成功/错误响应格式；auth.js 实现 Bearer+cookie 双通道 token 验证和 authGuard 包装器，提供 auth/status 和 auth/login 接口；static.js 实现静态文件服务、MIME 映射、路径穿越防护、SPA fallback（API 路径不 fallback）。41/41 测试全通过。

exported_interfaces.name: createAdminServer
exported_interfaces.signature: (options?) => { start, stop, server, getStatus, router }; options = { config: { enabled, host, port, token }, routes?, publicDir?, eventStore?, now?, serverFactory? }; start() => Promise<{ ok, disabled?, host?, port? }>

exported_interfaces.name: createRouter
exported_interfaces.signature: () => { add(method, pattern, handler), match(method, pathname) => { handler, params } | null, routes }

exported_interfaces.name: compilePattern
exported_interfaces.signature: (pattern) => { re: RegExp, names: string[] }

exported_interfaces.name: isAdminApiPath
exported_interfaces.signature: (pathname) => boolean

exported_interfaces.name: success
exported_interfaces.signature: (data) => { ok: true, data }

exported_interfaces.name: error
exported_interfaces.signature: (code, message) => { ok: false, error: { code, message } }

exported_interfaces.name: send
exported_interfaces.signature: (res, body, statusCode?) => void; 自动设置 JSON 头和状态码

exported_interfaces.name: errorCodeToStatus
exported_interfaces.signature: (errorCode) => number; UNAUTHORIZED→401, NOT_FOUND→404, etc.

exported_interfaces.name: extractToken
exported_interfaces.signature: (req) => string; 从 Authorization Bearer 或 cookie walker_admin_token 提取

exported_interfaces.name: isAuthenticated
exported_interfaces.signature: (req, config) => boolean; 无 token 配置时始终 true

exported_interfaces.name: createAuthGuard
exported_interfaces.signature: (config, responseModule) => (handler) => guardedHandler; 包装路由 handler 要求先通过鉴权

exported_interfaces.name: parseBody
exported_interfaces.signature: (req, callback) => void; 异步解析 JSON 请求体

exported_interfaces.name: createAuthHandlers
exported_interfaces.signature: (config, responseModule) => { statusHandler, loginHandler }; status→GET /auth/status, login→POST /auth/login

exported_interfaces.name: MIME_TYPES
exported_interfaces.signature: Object; 扩展名→Content-Type 映射表

exported_interfaces.name: getMimeType
exported_interfaces.signature: (filePath) => string

exported_interfaces.name: hasTraversal
exported_interfaces.signature: (urlPath) => boolean; 检测 .. 段

exported_interfaces.name: resolveFilePath
exported_interfaces.signature: (urlPath, publicDir) => string|null; 安全映射到文件系统路径

exported_interfaces.name: isSpaFallbackCandidate
exported_interfaces.signature: (pathname) => boolean; 排除 API 和已知静态扩展名

exported_interfaces.name: serveFile
exported_interfaces.signature: (res, filePath, responseModule) => void; 读取文件并返回

exported_interfaces.name: handleStatic
exported_interfaces.signature: (req, res, publicDir, responseModule) => void; 完整静态请求处理流程

notes: authGuard 使用包装器模式 (handler => guardedHandler)，而非中间件 (req, res, next) 模式，与路由匹配器的 handler 签名 (req, res, params) 一致。cookie Path 设置为 /（而非 /api/admin）以便 SPA 页面也能携带 cookie 访问 API。serverFactory 参数支持注入自定义 http.Server 创建逻辑，用于测试隔离。所有测试使用 port:0 随机端口和 Connection:close 头避免端口冲突和 ECONNRESET。
